zh.lifeSummary: 當Nichole de Cantilupe於大約1217年出生在英國肯特聶文頓時，她的父親William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo34歲，母親Millicent Gournay29歲。她於1235年12月3日與Geoffrey de Lucy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1257年在她的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nichole de Cantilupe于大约1217年出生在英国肯特聶文頓时，她的父亲William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo34岁，母亲Millicent Gournay29岁。她于1235年12月3日与Geoffrey de Lucy结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1257年在她的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nichole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Nichole de Cantilupe was born about 1217, in Newington, Kent, England, her father, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, was 34 and her mother, Millicent Gournay, was 29. She married Geoffrey de Lucy on 3 December 1235. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1257, in her hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nichole de Cantilupe est née environ 1217, à Newington, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Millicent Gournay, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Lucy le 3 décembre 1235. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1257, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nichole de Cantilupe um 1217 in Newington, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo 34 und ihre Mutter Millicent Gournay 29. Sie hat am 3. Dezember 1235 Geoffrey de Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1257 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nichole de Cantilupe è nata il circa 1217 nel Newington, Kent, England, sua padre, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Millicent Gournay, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Lucy il 3 dicembre 1235. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1257, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nichole de Cantilupeが約1217年にイギリスケントニューイントンで生まれた時，父William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Caunteloは34歳，母Millicent Gournayは29歳であった。1235年12月3日にGeoffrey de Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1257年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nichole de Cantilupe(이)가 대략 1217년 영국 켄트 뉴잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent Gournay(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1235년 12월 3일 Geoffrey de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1257년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Leicestershire, England: Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nichole de Cantilupe nasceu aproximadamente 1217, em Newington, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Millicent Gournay, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Lucy em 3 de dezembro de 1235. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1257, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nichole de Cantilupe родилась около 1217 г. в местности нюингтон, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Millicent Gournay, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Lucy 3 декабря 1235 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1257 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nichole de Cantilupe nació aproximadamente 1217, en Newington, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Millicent Gournay, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Geoffrey de Lucy el 3 de diciembre de 1235. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1257, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
